when about to design ui of pages, elements, layout etc, here are some tips you might adhere to, to further enhance your designing skills: look for this two files in the codebase, skill.md and ui-ux-skill-pattern.txt,
you can use them as tips to guide or aid you, when you need them. just as tip, you could expansiate on them for more desgn inspirations.

also when creating datables tables, be security consious, my db as you know it is supabase, so you take note of security by using the rls policies required for that kind of table created, and making sure anything you doing in the db, you security prone, and also my code should be security consious, so when you are creating any code, make sure to follow security best practices.

also always  check for all errors before you say you done building!!

when ever you writing code, always write comments, and make sure to write them in a way that they are easily understandable, and also make sure to write them in a way that they are helpful to other developers who might read your code in the future, and also make sure to write them in a way that they are helpful to you when you come back to your code after a long time.
